Operation '5fba4d5106b3934413ed10a788d72ff0' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The summary is clear and action-oriented, but the description is completely empty. Added comprehensive description explaining: the operation's purpose (creating webhook subscription), required inputs (workspace UUID and configuration), expected output (201 response with webhook object), and side effects (enables real-time event delivery). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new Zapier webhook subscription for the specified workspace. The webhook will receive event notifications from the Snitcher API. Requires a valid workspace UUID and webhook configuration in the request body. Returns a 201 Created response with the created webhook object containing the hook ID and subscription details. This enables real-time event delivery to Zapier for automation workflows.
data.reasoning: The summary is clear and action-oriented, but the description is completely empty. Added comprehensive description explaining: the operation's purpose (creating webhook subscription), required inputs (workspace UUID and configuration), expected output (201 response with webhook object), and side effects (enables real-time event delivery). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'e23eb9defde239e65c7fec7e0413c154' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The summary is clear and action-oriented, but the description is empty. Added comprehensive description explaining: the operation's purpose (removing webhook subscription), required inputs (workspace UUID and hook ID), expected output (200 OK response), and side effects (webhook stops receiving notifications and associated automations are affected). This provides AI agents with clear understanding of the operation's impact and when to use it.

data.description_suggestion: Removes an existing Zapier webhook subscription from the specified workspace. Requires the workspace UUID and the hook ID of the webhook to be deleted. Returns a 200 OK response upon successful deletion. After deletion, the webhook will no longer receive event notifications from the Snitcher API, and any associated Zapier automations relying on this webhook will stop receiving updates.
data.reasoning: The summary is clear and action-oriented, but the description is empty. This provides AI agents with clear understanding of the operation's impact and when to use it.
